example_queries: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1' LIMIT 10
SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm, bm_nm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%한국투자%' AND haeji_gb='1'
SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm, seolj_ymd FROM FDTFN001 WHERE unyong_cd='001' ORDER BY seolj_ymd DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT gijun_ymd, fund_cd, seolj_aek, nav FROM FDTFN201 ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) as latest_date FROM FDTFN201
SELECT gijun_ymd, seolj_aek, gijun_ga, nav FROM FDTFN201 WHERE fund_cd='펀드코드' ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek, d.nav FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201) ORDER BY d.seolj_aek DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT jm_upj_nm, jm_rt, jm_pyunga_aek FROM FDTPF301 WHERE fund_cd='펀드코드' ORDER BY ranking
SELECT fund_cd, jasan_gb, SUM(jm_pyunga_aek) as total FROM FDTPF301 WHERE gijun_ymd='20260331' GROUP BY fund_cd, jasan_gb
SELECT * FROM BB_TDF0JG ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT tr_ymd, ticker, item_ticker, op_unit, tg_unit FROM BB_TDF0JG WHERE ticker LIKE '%TDF%'
SELECT d_tr_ymd, i_index_cd, f_bond_index, f_day_rtn FROM BMJISU ORDER BY d_tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT tr_ymd, ticker, val FROM BB_EOD0IX WHERE ticker='KOSPI' ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT sec_nm, sec_tkr, wt FROM BB_HLDCLS WHERE idx_tck='KOSPI200' ORDER BY wt DESC LIMIT 20

common_queries.TDF펀드목록: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1'
common_queries.펀드설정액순위: SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek/100000000 as 설정액_억 FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201) AND f.haeji_gb='1' ORDER BY d.seolj_aek DESC LIMIT 20
common_queries.한국투자TDF: SELECT f.fund_cd, f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek, d.nav FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE f.fund_fnm LIKE '%한국투자%TDF%' AND f.haeji_gb='1' AND d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201)
common_queries.펀드수익률조회: SELECT gijun_ymd, gijun_ga, nav, silh_suik_rt FROM FDTFN201 WHERE fund_cd='펀드코드' ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 30
common_queries.자산배분현황: SELECT stock_paek, bond_paek, cash_paek, investment_etf FROM FDTFN201 WHERE fund_cd='펀드코드' ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 1

join_examples.펀드마스터+일별데이터: FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd = d.fund_cd
join_examples.펀드마스터+포트폴리오: FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTPF301 p ON f.fund_cd = p.fund_cd
